0.text: Peribronchial thickening in both lungs with luminal narrowing

1.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs

2.text: Focal centriacinar nodular infiltration in the subpleural area of the right lower lobe mediobasal segment

3.text: Scarring and atelectasis in the right upper lobe anteriorly, the right middle lobe, and the left lingula inferior segment
